repos.name: DietForge
issues: Supabase JWT anon key exposed in git history (commit a38fa8fc), valid until 2080
User input interpolated into ILIKE query in search-forgepedia/index.ts:56
Raw error messages exposed to UI in 27+ locations leaking internal details
Known CVEs in dependencies: serialize-javascript (RCE), xlsx (prototype pollution)
Client-side admin auth checks without confirmed Supabase RLS policy enforcement

repos.name: Zentrix Insights
issues: .env file with secrets committed to git history despite .gitignore entry
SSO tokens passed via URL hash params risk exposure in logs/history
Admin can change any user password without notification or audit logging
esbuild CVE-2024-51319: dev server request hijack via outdated vite dependency

repos.name: Zentrix Mail
issues: Supabase credentials (JWT token) exposed in git history, need rotation
OAuth tokens logged to console in gmail-sync, gmail-send, gmail-labels functions
CSP allows 'unsafe-inline' and 'unsafe-eval' for scripts in securityHeaders.ts
CORS set to wildcard '*' on all Supabase edge functions
Regex-based HTML sanitization in EmailBody.tsx instead of robust lib like DOMPurify
